case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS. LEON LIPSON

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-06-2014 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-06-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DANIEL SHINER--AGENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
